sourceSummary.oneLine: FPCB schematic title block and net/component labels for a one-sheet drawing.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports engineering traceability for FPCB schematic content; no regulatory authority, jurisdiction, or standard is stated.
keyPoints: Title block lists Title as FPCB.
Title block lists Rev as A.
Title block lists Date as Tuesday, March 18, 2025.
Sheet information is shown as 1 of 1.
Visible schematic labels include connectors CN2 and CN3 with 05002HR-H16J50, TD4 PTVS22VS1UR, U2 magnet1, CN1 Magnet, Ethernet TRX nets, and POWER_15V.
